title: Design the cache key and TTL
description: Define what varies the response, build the minimal cache key, and set TTLs with jitter per content class.
body: Steps: 1. Classify responses (static asset, semi-static, per-user dynamic). 2. For each, list the fields that genuinely change the body. 3. Build the cache key from only those; drop tracking/noise. 4. Set s-maxage per class, add jitter to avoid synchronized expiry, mark private/no-store for per-user. 5. Verify HIT/MISS behavior at the edge. Rollback point: before changing Vary/key on a live property. Validation: equivalent requests share a HIT and private content is never publicly cached.
